blockingIssues.description: The claimed fix commit 5854f064c65dda6e248ccc40c573bea7918314dc rewrites only scrutiny JSON artifacts and leaves core/tests/integration_db.rs using struct stand-ins (ItPlainStatus, ItPayloadState) instead of real Rust enums, so VAL-ER-001, VAL-ER-003, and VAL-ER-004 remain unproven.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require verification-only/fix workers to confirm that the commit they hand off actually touches the promised code or test surface before reporting success, especially when the tree is already clean.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of enum-roundtrip-real-enum-proof-fix found worker session 5a49229c-8062-44d6-9b26-dd2c49d38e13 reported success on commit 5854f064c65dda6e248ccc40c573bea7918314dc even though git show --stat for that commit changes only .factory/validation/m3-roundtrip-hardening/** JSON files and no Rust sources/tests.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: On Windows, explicitly instruct workers not to execute .sh entrypoints and instead read them as text and translate the steps into native commands during setup.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of enum-roundtrip-sensitive-and-cross found worker session 318fe76a-299a-4835-88bb-17c8b5544c82 attempted a direct .factory/init.sh execution despite repo/global Windows guidance forbidding .sh execution.

rejectedObservations.observation: Treat the updated pass report for num-roundtrip-plain-and-boundaries as sufficient proof that the original failure was fixed.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because the paired fix review still fails on HEAD: the underlying test file continues to use struct stand-ins and the cited fix commit modifies only validation artifacts, so the pass conclusion is unsupported.
